name: Spade & Club
description:
DAY 4

So, I always wanna say this, but in case I get a question about what inspired me to make the "It's Scooge Week" event, I got inspired by three things: One of Scooge's old posts, a random warriorkittys' artwork, and an album (yes, an album).

For Scooge's old post: Again, it's this old post. This exact post that inspired me to make the Scooge's event:

For the "random warriorkittys' artwork" part, it's this artwork that inspires me to make the event + the name:

And as for the album part... boy, you would not believe what album inspired me to make the event... CLICK ME

Yep, that album is what inspires me to make this event, as a way to pay homage to Scooge. In this album, the main purpose is to pay homage to the Hot Boys. I'm not tryna sound stupid; when planning for something to do, I was listening to that album, and it got me this funny idea: "If he pays homage to Hot Boys by making an album, what if I do the same thing, but pay homage to Scooge? And instead of an album, why not an event in JanitorAI?"

It's like that one clip from American Dad, when Roger somehow made a rifle, with just a small rock, twigs, and his bubble gum he was chewing on. Both are just like that: three random things can make a major thing.

Anyway, back to this bot. Before y'all say anything, yes, I know what you're thinking. And two, those who're confused how Spade is a futa... click this image: CLICK ME. And finally, you might know who gave you that question...

BOT MADE WITH THE HELP OF MENDER, OC & PIC OWNED BY EPHEMERALSCOOGE
creator: GRIMKid 0
